item.title: LEGO 60242 City Police Police Highway Arrest
item.description:
You can find LEGO 60242 City Police Police Highway Arrest with a discount here:

ℹ️:

  • The set accessories include a stolen safe with gold bars and a banknote, a crate of fish, handcuffs and a road stop to crash the cars!
  • Police Highway Arrest
  • Manufacturer recommended age: 5+
  • Includes 2 minifigures: Duke DeTain and thief Vito to recreate scenes from LEGO City Adventures TV series in car chase plays
  • Number of pieces: 185

🛒 Buy it!!

item.title: LEGO City Ice-Cream Van 60253 Playset Featuring an Ice-Cream Van Ice-Cream Lady and Skateboarder Minifigures and a Cute Dog Figure; Great Gift for Kids 200 Pieces
item.description:
There’s a deal LEGO City Ice-Cream Van 60253 Playset Featuring an Ice-Cream Van Ice-Cream Lady and Skateboarder Minifigures and a Cute Dog Figure; Great Gift for Kids 200 Pieces here:

ℹ️:

  • This truck toy for 5 plus year old girls and boys lets kids enjoy summer fun with an easy-access van interior, and a movable van roof ice-cream post
  • Digital Instructions PLUS guide via the free LEGO Life app for smart devices helps kids to zoom, rotate and visualise the model as they build
  • Features a colourful ice-cream van toy truck with funny stickers, removable drivers cabin roof and wide-opening side doors
  • Kids can help drive the van, serve ice-cream cones and lollies from the serving hatch and help the skateboarder perform cool tricks
  • Includes 2 minifigures and a dog figure, plus an array of awesome accessories: a popsicle, cone, safety helmet, and a green banknote
  • The supercool ice cream van toy makes a fun holiday, birthday or Christmas gift for 5 plus year old girls and boys who love summer toys

🛒 Buy it now!!

item.title: LEGO Technic 42110 Land Rover Defender Maquette de Voiture a Construire Idée Cadeau Jouet pour Enfant de 11 ans et +
item.description:
You’ve got LEGO Technic 42110 Land Rover Defender Maquette de Voiture a Construire Idée Cadeau Jouet pour Enfant de 11 ans et + at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • Number of pieces: 2573
  • The car model also features removable roof rack with storage box, pannier, ladder and traction mats, opening doors, bonnet and rear door
  • Manufacturer recommended age: 11+
  • Land Rover Defender
  • The cabin features a detailed dashboard, working steering wheel and forward-folding rear seats that reveal the 4-speed sequential gearbox
